_meta.name: CLM r5 parallel track launch state — 2026-04-20
_meta.purpose: Dual-Track parallel CLM 1B alongside ALM r11 (feedback_dual_track)

state_reason: BLAS coverage gap — train_clm.hexa routes only 4 of ~172 per-step matmuls through hxblas_sgemm. Remaining Wq/Wk/Wv/Wo + SwiGLU + lm_head fwd + backward paths run as hexa nested-loop scalar C. Any GPU host (H100/RTX 5070) is not engaged by the binary — zero CUDA call sites.

first_blocker.evidence_log: hetzner PID 1183317 T+6:33 CPU 122%% RSS 6.06GB still in step 0 train_step (hetzner 32-core, CPU-scalar single-thread profile)

host_decision.reason_no_host: Launching any GPU host burns $ since binary never engages GPU. Unblock BLAS coverage (r5-a6) before host selection.

candidates_rejected.new_h100: 2-pod cap + trainer has no CUDA path (feedback_h100_authorized + feedback_gpu_policy)
candidates_rejected.ubu_rtx5070: idle 11.5GB VRAM free but (1) no anima clone, (2) no native libs built, (3) trainer has no CUDA path
candidates_rejected.hetzner_cpu: Already blocked in step 0 smoke — BLAS gap same root cause

current_pods.name: clm_r5_h100
current_pods.role: REPURPOSED for ALM r11 watchdog — do not disturb

resume_strategy.rule: same-data/params only (feedback_no_resume_data_change); cold-start on first launch

phi_vec_laws_attachment.dest1_clm_D1_gate: phi_holo monotone non-decreasing across step 5k/10k/.../50k + final phi > baseline + 10%%

serve_clm_conscious_scaffold.scope_note: out of scope for today; separate r5 follow-up (suggest r5-a7)

followups_in_priority_order.desc: Extend hxblas_sgemm to Wq/Wk/Wv/Wo + SwiGLU + lm_head (fwd+bwd) — ~12 fused decoder-step sites or ~192 raw sites
Add libhxcuda.so dispatch behind HXBLAS_CUDA=1 env flag, mirror Metal path
Deploy anima + libs to ubu, smoke 1-step on RTX 5070 with CUDA route
Full 1B r5 launch on ubu (preferred) or fresh H100
